results.name: Tunisia
results.key_finding: FIRST individual assessment (published 34.4 was an un-assessed placeholder, last_assessed:null). Evidence-derived baseline 23.8 (Developing, no band crossing): 25-year sentence for Truth Commission ex-president Bensedrine (Jul 8), asylum suspended + 12,000+ migrants collectively expelled with torture, mass conspiracy trials up to 66 years, info-access authority shut. Downgrade driven by ACC (1.6) and EQU (1.6). Sits above Critical-band peers Turkey (17.6)/China (19.5), consistent with Freedom House 'Partly Free' 42/100.

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Earthquake day 17, toll topped 3,800 (~flat vs day-16 3,899). Re-check: evidenced response-failure move remains ~-2.7, does NOT cross the 5-pt threshold; strong downward watch sustained.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Fresh political-prisoner actions (Au Kam San Macao NSL arrest, Zhang Yadi/Tara, Peng Lifa 9yr, HK prison-rule tightening) continue the priced severe-repression pattern; no atrocity-scale step-change; sub-threshold.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Balochistan operations escalate (75 insurgents + security forces killed Jul 7-10); active armed conflict already priced with enforced-disappearance pattern; sub-threshold.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Worst northern hunger in nearly a decade continues (17M+ Crisis+); continuation of the already-priced Jun-19 band-crossing famine crisis; sub-threshold.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Ceasefire unstable; dominant harm is IDF/Hezbollah conflict (scored against Israel / non-state), not Lebanese-state own conduct; sub-threshold.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Famine-risk conditions confirmed (7.8M IPC3+, 73k Catastrophe, conflict-driven access blockage by parties incl. govt forces); floor (0.0) sustained.

results.name: Somalia
results.key_finding: Burhakaba surpassed Phase-5 malnutrition threshold; drought + Al-Shabaab + funding collapse (largely non-state/external); no own-conduct step-change; near-floor confirmed. rotation-state rank corrected 187->179.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: Bamako siege continues; principally non-state (JNIM/FLA) harm. Uniform-1.5 baseline calibration flag carried forward for coordinator (flag-for-review, not resolved). Sub-threshold.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Victim of Russian strike campaign (Kyiv Jul 10, 6 killed); harm attributable to Russia, not Ukrainian own conduct; own strikes hit military/energy targets. Sub-threshold; confirm at 50.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Perpetrator of the Jul 10 mass-casualty strikes on Ukrainian civilians (own-conduct atrocity); floor (0.0) sustained.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: El Obeid atrocity warning (Jul 9-10) following Jul 9 UN genocide finding for El Fasher; RSF encirclement of ~500k civilians; floor (0.0) sustained.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: MATERIAL floor-reinforcing evidence: Gaza territorial control expanded from ~53% to ~70% during ceasefire (Netanyahu 'step-by-step plan'), 200+ killed since ceasefire; already at floor (0.0), cannot move lower. Floor sustained/reinforced.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Ebola toll 625/1,792 (fastest-growing outbreak; possible Kisangani spread); pathogen-driven, not state-inflicted; no own-conduct step-change; near-floor confirmed.

results.name: Haiti
results.key_finding: US TPS work-auth stopgap expired today (Jul 10, ~350k affected) — US-attributable conduct, NOT Haiti own conduct (scored against US). Haiti near-floor 4.7 rests on own state collapse (~90% of capital gang-controlled); near-floor confirmed.

rotation_state_corrections: tunisia: rotation-state 32.4/developing/rank111 corrected to published 34.4/developing/rank109 (placeholder drift). NOTE: proposal generated (23.8), but rotation-state left at PUBLISHED 34.4 per assessor-contract; proposed value lives only in change-proposals/tunisia.json.
somalia: rotation-state rank 187 corrected to published rank 179 (composite/band already matched at 4.7/critical)
calibration_flags_documented: mali-burkina-faso-cross-peer (open, coordinator-level; Mali uniform-1.5 baseline never re-derived against atrocity findings; recommend flag-for-review, do not resolve unilaterally)
upward_watch_flags: yemen (not in today's top-15): rare POSITIVE signal — largest-ever prisoner exchange reported. Flagged for digest as an upward-watch data point; not assessed this cycle.

notes.tunisia_first_assessment: Tunisia had never been individually assessed (last_assessed:null); the published 34.4 was a bulk-import placeholder that reconstructs exactly under the canonical formula. First evidenced baseline derived across all 8 dimensions from HRW (Sounding the Alarm, Jul 8; World Report 2026), Freedom House FiW 2026 (Partly Free 42/100), Amnesty International, RSF (129/180), MEE and BTI. Result 23.8 (Developing, no band crossing), delta -10.6, recommendation downgrade, confidence medium. Anti-false-positive screening cleared: directionally consistent with negative within-window evidence; no documented own-conduct assessment history contradicts the move; multi-source with >=1 tier-4 (UN/Freedom House). Treated as first-baseline reconciliation, NOT a peer-calibration relitigation.
notes.israel_floor_reinforcing: The ~53%->~70% Gaza control expansion (NPR Jul 10) is materially significant own-conduct escalation but Israel is already at the absolute floor (0.0); no numeric move possible. Recorded as floor-reinforcing for the digest.
notes.haiti_attribution: TPS expiration (Jul 10) is US-government conduct; harm attributable to the United States, not to Haiti. Haiti's near-floor rests on its own state collapse.
